data.body: MILESTONE: a118 (B1) CLOSED + completion-signed — the full Phase-3 baseline-consumer-swap rollout is complete end-to-end. Operational ACs all satisfied live: (1) 30 consecutive clean shadow passes over 4hrs; (2) capped live heal demonstrated (synthetic 8519<->REB-877, bilateral pre-heal backup [REST JSON + git tag, abort-checked], archive->binding_walk TERMINAL_TRANSITION heal REB-877 To Do->Done via bridge run 29061224115, breaker-allowed 1/854<<0.10, guaranteed bilateral cleanup: REB-877 deleted + 8519 purged, binding self-retires); (3) flag flip (441); (4) clean flag-ON pass (mutations identical to pre-flip). Code ACs merged (434 swap, 435 decision_census test). Epic ace2 now: 9622 closed, a118 closed, d01e in_progress (harness foundation merged 436; live matrix remaining — NOW UNBLOCKED since a118 streak done), eca4 open (loader refactor, last). Continuing with d01e live matrix (live-run authorized).
